description: Description trigger 'when choosing libraries' is broad and risks loading the skill on any Go session involving library decisions, flooding context with library catalogs when a specific skill would suffice
suggested_fix: Narrow the trigger to specific decision scenarios, e.g., 'when evaluating a new library dependency for the first time' or 'when comparing multiple libraries for the same use case'
